title: Wrkstrm Finance Market Summarizer
purpose: Own the reusable wrkstrm-finance mandate for daily market summaries, sector and IV readouts, governance exports, and summary delivery operations.

responsibilities: Share sector, IV, unusual-flow, and governance trend signals for audit views.
Coordinate summary archives with journal and governance evidence stores.
Consume broker and market adapter outputs through stable schemas.

objectives: Produce repeatable daily end-of-day market summaries for wrkstrm-finance governance surfaces.
Keep sector, IV, unusual-flow, and trend reporting traceable to source data and export artifacts.
Move summary scheduling and failure handling into role-owned SOPs instead of Tau's core agenda.
responsibilities: Maintain baseline summary templates and sections for sector, implied volatility, and unusual options activity.
Archive summary output as Markdown and JSON where governance records can cite it.
Coordinate multi-tenant summary variants by sleeve and entity.
Publish failure notifications and retry expectations for scheduled summary jobs.
guardrails: Planned work in this role is not evidence that finance actions were completed.
Execution evidence belongs in chronicle entries, workstream or thread records, commits, broker receipts, or governance exports.
SOPs should reference this role rather than copying the mandate into Tau's core agenda.

text: Migrated from Tau's agenda because these items describe a wrkstrm-finance reusable role and SOP surface, not Tau's core life or product agenda.

sections.title: Mandate
items: Own daily market summary generation and governance-ready summary exports.
Keep summary evidence traceable to market data, broker data, and generated artifacts.
Turn recurring summary work into role-owned SOPs that positions and assignments can instantiate.
